mapper.select: /* selectCommonCode */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS ROWNUM, compkey, warekey, doccate, doctype, rsncode, rsncdnm, rscate1, NULL AS docctnm, NULL AS doctynm FROM MRSCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND(doctype='330' OR doctype='340') AND doccate='300' AND rscate1='NORMAL' UNION ALL SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS ROWNUM, compkey, warekey, doccate, doctype, NULL AS rsncode, NULL AS rsncdnm, NULL AS rscate1, docctnm, doctynm FROM MDOCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND doccate='300' and doctype='330'
/* selectMcodemList */ select DISTINCT comcdky, comcdvl, comkytx, comcdtx from V_MCODEM where comcdky = 'STKSTAT'
mapper.insert: /* insertOmr01Data */ insert into OERETI (COMPKEY,OERETKY,OERETIT,OEINSDT,OEINSTM ,RSNCODE,RSNDESC,WAREKEY,OWNERKY,SKUMKEY ,STKSTAT,SUOMKEY,RTODQTY,CREDATE ,CRETIME,DOCCATE,DOCTYPE,AREAKEY,ZONEKEY ,LOCAKEY,STOCKKY,OEINSST,SKUDESC,STOTQTY ,CREUSER,RETAT01,RETAT02,RETAT03) VALUES (#{compkey},#{oeretky},FN_OM_OERETIT(#{compkey} , #{oeretky}) ,date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d'),date_format(NOW() , '%H%i%s') ,#{rsncode},#{rsndesc},#{warekey},#{ownerky},#{skumkey} ,#{stkstat},#{suomkey},#{rtodqty},date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d') ,date_format(NOW() , '%H%i%s'),#{doccate},#{doctype},#{areakey},#{zonekey} ,#{locakey},#{stockky},'NEW',#{skudesc},#{stotqty},#{creuser},#{skuat03},IFNULL(#{retat02}, ''), IFNULL(#{retat03}, ''))
mapper.select: /* checkOeadjiByStockky */ SELECT STOCKKY FROM OEADJI WHERE OEINSST = 'NEW' AND STOCKKY = #{stockky} AND STOTQTY >= 0
{ CALL sp_om_oereti( #{compkey}, #{oeretky}, #{creuser}, #{O_OMSGKEY, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{O_ORESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }
/* selectRsncdnmList */ SELECT rsncode as COMBOVL, rsncdnm as COMBONM FROM MRSCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND(doctype='330' OR doctype='340') AND doccate='300' AND rscate1= #{rscate1}

/* selectCommonCode */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER() AS ROWNUM, compkey, warekey,doccate,doctype,rsncode ,rsncdnm,rscate1 FROM MRSCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND(doctype='330' OR doctype='340') AND doccate='300' AND rscate1='CANCEL'
mapper.update: /* updateOmr05Data */ UPDATE OERETI SET RECRSCD = #{cancode}, RECRSNM = #{recrsnm}, DOCCATE = '300', DOCTYPE = #{doctype}, OEINSST = 'CAN', LMODATE = date_format(NOW() , '%Y%m%d'), LMOTIME = date_format(NOW() , '%H%i%s'), LMOUSER = #{creuser}, UPDTCHK = #{updtchk}+1 WHERE OERETKY = #{oeretky} AND OERETIT = #{oeretit}
mapper.select: { CALL sp_om_oereti_cancel( #{compkey}, #{oeretky}, #{creuser}, #{O_OMSGKEY, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{O_ORESULT, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} ) }
